curation_notes: Primary locations derived from the patch diff which modifies on_attribute (replacing inline TOCTOU-vulnerable safety check with safe_getattr) and on_formattedvalue (replacing direct fmt.format() with safe_format). The vulnerability class race-condition matches the pre-assigned CWE-367 TOCTOU classification. Only 2 non-test source files were changed (asteval/asteval.py and asteval/astutils.py). No sibling files — the asteval package contains only asteval.py, astutils.py, and __init__.py.
